description: Upper right corner of a deed of acknowledgment (iqrār). In Arabic script. Muʾnisa(?) [...] bt. Nāṣir b. Wuhayb(?) acknowledges receipt of a sum of money from her ex-husband Mūsā b. Sālim. There might be a single word in Hebrew script (שמע?) but this would be very unusual. Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
